productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherette Light Brown Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun! Height: 30 cm Width: 35 cm Depth: 6 cm Made of synthetic leather for durability Main compartment has a clasp button flap closure with one zippered compartment, one inner zipper, a zippered seperator and organiser sleeve for a mobile and essentials Two short straps and a long adjustable and removable strap for carrying ease and style A removable pouch for additional space Brand name appliqué d on the front One zippered pocket on the front for additional space Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
